description: Create a two-column content slide on optimism about the long-term future in 2025, with explanatory text on the left and a horizontal stacked bar chart by market on the right showing agree vs disagree percentages.

header.headline: In 2025 people in [COUNTRY] will start to feel more optimistic about the long-term future
header.sub: Please indicate if you agree very much, agree somewhat, disagree somewhat or disagree very much with the following statements:

left.body:
Please indicate if you agree very much, agree somewhat, disagree somewhat or disagree very much with the following statements:

Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024
